---
title: "Biosketch - Miel Hostens"
author: Miel Hostens
subtitle: "Robert and Anne Everett Associate Professor of Digital Dairy Management"
date: last-modified
toc: true
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc-location: right
    smooth-scroll: true
    number-sections: false
---

{{< include sections/appointments.qmd >}}
{{< include sections/research-focus.qmd >}}
{{< include sections/output.qmd >}}
